sourceMovie.title: Descendants 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Descendants 2 works as a family movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The family and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Descendants
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Descendants 2 clicked for you, Descendants (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and fantasy, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Descendants 2?
faq.answer: Try Descendants, Descendants 3, Trolls—each shares DNA with Descendants 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Descendants 2?
faq.answer: Descendants 2 (2017) is best described as Family, Fantasy, TV Movie, Adventure, Music. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Descendants 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Descendants Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
